title: Monday Team settings

posts.author: bhen33 (Bri Henson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I’m trying to figure out if there is a way to set a team as a board owner. Also trying to figure out what the default is for a team as well.

Building a workspace for a department and trying to make it as user friendly as possible. One thing that would help is if someone can assign a person to a team and they automatically become a board owner or not a board owner depending on the team they are in. There are going to be a large number of boards so it would be great to only have to add someone to a team rather than add them to each board and set them as a board owner or not a board owner.

If this is something that can be set as an Admin level user then great! Please let me know what they need to do. I am not an Admin level user, but my manager was just granted that level by IT.

Thank you in advance!

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @bhen33 - Sadly, Teams cannot be assigned as owners of boards only individual user accounts can have this. Admins by default have visibility and can make themselves owners of all boards (excluding Private and Shareable boards they are not subscribed to).

Thanks,
Mark

posts.author: bhen33 (Bri Henson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Mark,

Thank you so much for replying. At least we can use teams for those that do not need complete board power.

bhen33
